# Love Key

> Love Key Guardian is an NFC keyring that connects people to mental health support and emergency helplines with one tap. 50% of profits are donated to Lifeline and Bendigo Health Foundation.

Love Key is an Australian brand selling a single product — the Love Key Guardian, a polished metal NFC keyring. Tapping or scanning it opens a web page with clear guidance, emergency steps, and mental health support resources. No app is required.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, how it works, pricing, and checkout for the Love Key Guardian.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How Love Key handles customer and visitor data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms governing purchases and use of the Love Key website.
- [Disclaimer](/disclaimer): Important safety notice — Love Key does not replace emergency services.
